meta.title: Major General Ray Smith on FOX 32 Chicago
meta.description:
Major General Ray Smith spoke with Fox Chicago on March 25, 2015 about how Sandboxx reconnects our veterans and keeps our service members in touch with loved ones.

Download the Sandboxx app free: https://lynm.app.link/yts

Get more from Sandboxx:
https://www.facebook.com/sandboxxapp/ 
https://twitter.com/sandboxx
https://www.instagram.com/sandboxxapp/
https://www.pinterest.com/sandboxxapp/
http://www.sandboxx.us/
